name: M4A4 | 彼岸花
descriptionEn: More accurate but less damaging than its AK-47 counterpart, the M4A4 is the full-auto assault rifle of choice for CTs. It has been custom painted with a dark blue base and red spider lilies above the magazine and trigger. Bright colors are a warning, not an invitation
descriptionZh: 与同级的 AK-47 相比更精准，但杀伤力更低，M4A4 是反恐精英可选的全自动突击步枪。 这把武器以深蓝色为基调，弹夹和扳机上方配有红色的彼岸花。 鲜艳的色彩是一种警告，而不是邀请
